def: Of or pertaining to Nubia in Eastern Africa.-- n.
Pertaining to, affected with, or of the nature of, epilepsy.
Milk curdled so as to become thick.
To utter rapidly, idly, or indistinctly.Begin his witless note apace to chatter. Spenser.
Of the form of a pear.
One of the larger divisions of Crustacea, so called because thethorax and abdomen are both segmented; Tetradecapoda. It includes theAmphipoda and Isopoda.
A name for several species of mushroom, of which one(Cantharellus cibrius) is edible, the others reputed poisonous.
